programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Learn creative drills to train a better downswing and find out how Michael Jackson's moonwalk will improve your impact; Devan will also reveal a tip for the transition used by Viktor Hovland.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake will reveal the most important swing angles and teach you how to achieve those positions; learn Devan's favorite drills for ideal angles in the backswing, downswing, at impact and in the finish.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top tips from the world's best teacher have been compiled to make you a better ball striker; Nathalie Sheehan reveals how to eliminate fat contact, Chris Como teaches his Statue of Liberty Drill and Martin Hall goes in-depth.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top tips from the world's best teachers have been compiled to improve your short game; Devan Bonebrake reveals how to make perfect chipping contact, Aimee Cho teaches how a towel can improve your pitch shots and Martin Hall featured.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top tips from the world's best teachers have been compiled to help you out of greenside bunkers; Devan Bonebrake shares Jordan Spieth's sand secret, Nathalie Sheehan teaches a unique grip for bunker shots and James Oh featured.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top instruction tips from Aimee Cho have been compiled to improve your game from tee-to-green; learn the key 3-wood fundamentals, how to crush your longest drives, a secret to the flop shot and how to flush your long irons.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top instruction tips from John Montgomery have been compiled to improve your game from tee-to-green; learn how to hit the knockdown shot, make solid wedge contact from tight lies, drive the ball longer and make more putts.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top instruction tips from Debbie Doniger have been compiled to improve your game from tee-to-green; learn how to get more distance with the driver, chip the ball closer, improve from greenside bunkers and change your stance for solid contact.

programme.title: Home Course Advantage
programme.desc: Love, loss and life may best describe the Andrade family's journey through the game of golf; from how her mom and dad met to the unexpected loss of her first coach; Daniela Andrade is looking to the game of golf to turn tragedy into triumph.

programme.title: Home Course Advantage
programme.desc: After enduring seven rounds of high dose chemotherapy at age 9, Liam Eyer bravely faced and beat cancer; now, in his freshman year of high school in San Jose, Liam aims to play golf in college and become a pediatric oncologist.

programme.title: Home Course Advantage
programme.desc: Immigrating from Somalia, Rashid Ibrahim came to the United States with nothing; all he had was a dream and the hope of a better life for his family; it wasn't until he found the game of golf that the dream began to feel like reality.

programme.title: Home Course Advantage
programme.desc: Malia Loo was introduced to the game of golf by her father David, and since she was a little girl, he's been her swing coach, mentor, and caddy.

programme.title: Home Course Advantage
programme.desc: With the guidance of Paula Tucker and her "Fore Life" program, Patrick has become one of the most promising young golfers in Florida.

programme.title: Home Course Advantage
programme.desc: Love, loss and life may best describe the Andrade family's journey through the game of golf; from how her mom and dad met to the unexpected loss of her first coach; Daniela Andrade is looking to the game of golf to turn tragedy into triumph.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal teams up with Sabrina Andolpho, founder of the influencer group Golf Girl Games, for competitions with athletes and celebrities.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal competes against Lucy Robson on the Riverside course at Portstewart Golf Club in Northern Ireland.

programme.title: My Roots: Ernie Els
programme.desc: Follow Ernie's journey from his early years in South Africa, to his climb to world No. 1, his battles with Tiger and the creation of his foundation Els for Autism.

programme.title: My Roots
programme.desc: The life and career of Darren Clarke of Northern Ireland; the path of golf, his life and his career, from Wake Forest University to the European Tour, the PGA Tour and beyond; his experience as a member of the European Ryder Cup team.

programme.title: My Roots: Bernhard Langer
programme.desc: Bernhard Langer shares his own story in open and honest language, giving golf fans an unprecedented look at his life, losses, and love of the game.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches how to coordinate the lead and trail side body parts to become a better ball striker.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Learn vital correct information and creative drills to improve grip pressure, footwork, trail arm in the takeaway and head movement throughout the swing.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Learn how to build a practice station for improving start line, an easy guide to green reading and tips for better speed control used by 2023 Masters Champion Jon Rahm.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Learn a Ben Hogan tip for improving a backswing, how an alignment stick can cure a transition faults and a creative drill using maracas to shake up a downswing sequence.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake covers the biggest keys and teaches his favorite drills for getting up and down from greenside bunkers.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Ian Poulter, 12-time European Tour winner and Ryder Cup stalwart, showcases his very best putting instruction. He shares his best advice on how to improve your scoring from all distances on the green.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Ian Poulter showcases his very best putting instruction. He teaches how to make more putts focusing on comfort and your natural abilities on the greens.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
